name: Hot"vanilla
recipeIngredient: Ground cinnamon & a cinnamon stick -- garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat milk in a saucepan over medium heat or in the microwave until hot but not boiling.
2. Remove from heat and stir in honey and vanilla.
3. Ladle into mugs, sprinkle with cinnamon, and serve with a cinnamon-stick stirrer.
